notes: fixture session: slab allocator fail — GDB commands enable basic allocator reversal but heap state inference blocked by complex slab topology

debug_gdb_commands confirmed slab header field offsets and free-list pointer location via breakpoints on the allocator init path, but the multi-tier slab topology (thread-local caches, central arena, large-object bypass) is too complex to infer heap state without a dedicated walker script targeting this specific allocator variant
